data.title: World has released World ID v4.0, introducing account abstraction and multi-key support.
data.description: World (formerly Worldcoin) announced the release of World ID v4.0, introducing an account abstraction architecture into its protocol system. This upgrade transforms World ID from a single-key mechanism to an abstract record in the public registry "WorldIDRegistry," supporting multiple authorized keys and enabling users to generate authentication credentials across different devices and platforms. World stated that the core improvements in the new version include: support for multi-key and multi-validator management, increasing flexibility while maintaining the same identity; enhanced protocol resilience by introducing key rotation, revocation, and optional recovery proxy mechanisms; the launch of a web-based reference validator to simplify the browser experience; enhanced privacy protection by generating one-time null values ​​through OPRF nodes; and the addition of a trusted party registry to help validators identify request sources, prevent phishing attacks, and lay the foundation for a future protocol fee mechanism.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Futures Face Significant Liquidations
data.description: In the past 24 hours, major cryptocurrency perpetual futures have undergone substantial liquidation volumes. According to NS3.AI, BTC futures witnessed $123 million in liquidations, predominantly affecting long positions. Similarly, ETH futures experienced liquidations totaling $42.85 million, with long positions being the majority. Gold token futures (XAU) saw $10.83 million in liquidations, primarily impacting short positions.

data.title: Silver Futures Experience Significant Surge Amid Supply Shortage
data.description:
Silver futures have experienced a remarkable increase of over 275% in the past year, driven by a significant physical supply shortage. According to NS3.AI, only 14% of outstanding futures contracts are supported by registered silver inventories. The large commercial short positions, which more than double the available deliverable supply, have led to a classic short squeeze, with persistent backwardation indicating high immediate demand.

The industrial demand for silver, particularly from the solar panel production sector, has intensified the supply constraints. In contrast, gold has maintained stability due to better inventory coverage and a normal market structure.

data.title: Nvidia, Amazon, and Microsoft Consider $60 Billion Investment in OpenAI
data.description: Nvidia, Amazon, and Microsoft are reportedly in discussions to invest up to $60 billion in OpenAI. According to Foresight News, this new round of funding could potentially value OpenAI at $730 billion.

data.title: A whale that started accumulating digital gold positions in October 2025 has a floating profit of $3.865 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address (0x8C0...0F364) has been gradually accumulating digital gold-like tokens since October 2025, and currently has a floating profit of $3.865 million. This address purchased 2371.4 XAUT and 559.74 PAXG at an average price of $4239, achieving a three-month return of 31.1%.

data.title: A whale received $25.43 million worth of HYPE from Galaxy Digital OTC and pledged it.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0xd4d5...bc10) has received another 445,000 HYPE tokens from Galaxy Digital OTC, worth $14.87 million. To date, this whale has received a total of 910,000 HYPE tokens from Galaxy Digital OTC, worth $25.43 million, of which 465,000 HYPE tokens (worth $15.73 million) have been used for staking.

data.title: Deribit: Options positioning structure puts pressure on Bitcoin price around $90,000.
data.description: Cryptocurrency options exchange Deribit stated that Bitcoin's recent price has been suppressed around $90,000, primarily due to a large number of open options contracts concentrated near the current strike price and the approaching large-scale expiration date of January 30th. Deribit pointed out that current market risk exposure is established more through options than highly leveraged futures, with traders tending to use hedging and structured strategies to manage risk. Analysis suggests that the high options trading volume, especially for short-term put options, indicates that funds are still in the market but risk control is becoming stricter, with short-term price movements being more driven by position structure than external news. Data shows that Bitcoin has been fluctuating between $85,000 and $95,000 since mid-November. This Friday will see the expiration of Bitcoin monthly options with a notional value of approximately $8.4 billion, a put/call ratio of 0.54, with the biggest resistance level at $90,000 and the most open contracts concentrated near the $100,000 strike price. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 88,000 USDT with a 1.41% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 29, 2026, 02:47 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 88,000 USDT and is now trading at 87,892.210938 USDT, with a narrowed 1.41% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Hyperliquid's Trade.xyz Achieves Record Trading Volume
data.description:
Hyperliquid's on-chain perpetual decentralized exchange, Trade.xyz, has reached a new milestone with its 24-hour trading volume surpassing $2 billion. According to BlockBeats, this marks a historic high for the platform.

Additionally, the protocol's current open interest stands at $850 million.

data.title: TRX Transfer from Cobo.com to Anonymous Addresses
data.description: At 10:30, 12 million TRX were transferred from Cobo.com to an anonymous address, according to ChainCatcher. The initial recipient then moved 12,000,032 TRX to another anonymous address. The transactions highlight ongoing activity in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Aster launches $50,000 "The Metal Surge Metal Token Trading Challenge"
data.description: The cryptocurrency market is experiencing a "metal craze." With the high volatility of the precious metals market and the continued rise in community enthusiasm, metal tokens have become a focal point of discussion among traders. Aster, an on-chain trading platform focused on high performance and privacy, today announced the launch of "The Metal Surge Trading Challenge," with a total prize pool of $50,000 USDF up for grabs! • Event Period: January 29, 02:30 – February 5, 16:00 (UTC) • Total Prize Pool: $50,000 USDF • Participating Trading Pairs: XAUUSDT (Gold), XAGUSDT (Silver), XPTUSDT (Platinum), XCUUSDT (Copper). Aster will add more popular metal trading pairs in real time based on market trends. Points System: OI Points = Position Size × Holding Hours Example: • Holding $50K for 24 hours = 1.2M points • Holding $100K for 12 hours = 1.2M points • Only whole hours are counted (partial hours are not counted). Trading Acceleration: Earn bonus points upon reaching trading volume thresholds • Cumulative trading volume > $1M: 1.03x multiplier • Cumulative trading volume > $5M: 1.2x multiplier • Cumulative trading volume > $10M: 1.5x multiplier Reward Settlement • Personal Reward = $50,000 × (Personal Bonus Points ÷ Total Server Points) • Trading Volume Requirement: Total cumulative trading volume during the event period must be ≥ $10,000 • Minimum Payout: Reward must be ≥ 1 USDF • Zero Threshold: No ASTER holding required to participate

data.title: Meta and Microsoft Highlight AI Investments in Growth Strategies
data.description:
Meta and Microsoft have released their fourth-quarter results and 2026 outlook, emphasizing AI investments as a core component of their growth strategies. According to ChainCatcher, both companies are focusing on AI infrastructure, which could benefit Bitcoin mining firms that have transitioned to AI infrastructure.

Meta projects its capital expenditure for 2026 to be between $115 billion and $135 billion, surpassing the market's general expectation of $110 billion. Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella stated that the scale of Microsoft's AI business has exceeded some of its core operations.

Several mining companies have shifted their data centers to host AI and cloud computing machines. Iren, formerly known as Iris Energy, has signed a multi-year cloud services contract with Microsoft. Cipher Mining has entered into an agreement with Amazon to provide 300 megawatts of power capacity for AWS. Additionally, companies like Hut 8 are accelerating their transformation efforts.

As a result of these developments, Iren's stock rose by 4.9% on Wednesday, with a cumulative increase of 47% since 2026. Cipher Mining has seen a 17% rise in its stock value this year.

data.title: Google Postpones Ban on Unregistered Overseas Crypto Apps in South Korea
data.description: Google has delayed its plan to block mobile applications from overseas cryptocurrency exchanges that are not registered as Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASPs) in South Korea. According to NS3.AI, the postponement is attributed to internal challenges and ongoing evaluations within the company. Google is currently working with relevant departments to determine its approach to implementing the ban.

data.title: A16z-Backed Address Acquires 243,000 HYPE Tokens
data.description:
A16z-backed address has reportedly purchased 243,000 HYPE tokens through Anchorage early this morning. According to ChainCatcher, the address now holds a total of 1.53 million HYPE tokens.

In September of last year, a similar transaction was identified as a potential a16z address, which acquired 210,000 HYPE tokens at that time.

data.title: Hong Kong Monetary Authority Maintains Benchmark Rate at 4%
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has decided to keep its benchmark interest rate steady at 4%. According to ChainCatcher, this decision comes as the U.S. Federal Reserve also opted to hold its rates unchanged overnight. This move reflects a cautious approach amid ongoing global economic uncertainties.

data.title: Entity Accumulates 10% of LINK Tokens Through 48 Wallets, Analyst Reports
data.description:
PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). An analysis by on-chain analyst LinkBoi has revealed that a single entity may have accumulated approximately 10% of LINK tokens using 48 interconnected wallets. The investigation into the top 100 LINK holders showed that these wallets each hold around 2 million LINK tokens and exhibit highly synchronized trading patterns.

The analyst noted that the wallets executed similar-sized purchases on identical dates, suggesting they are likely controlled by the same entity. Between August 2025 and January 2026, this entity reportedly amassed about 100 million LINK tokens, representing 10% of the total supply.

The accumulation strategy appears to have been meticulously planned to avoid drawing market attention or affecting the token's price. The identity of the entity remains undisclosed.

data.title: Pearl Labs Enhances AI Data Integrity with Blockchain Technology
data.description: Pearl Labs is utilizing blockchain technology to ensure transparent AI data provenance and integrity. According to NS3.AI, the company employs Solana's infrastructure to significantly cut down the time required for constructing data pipelines while efficiently handling millions of AI training data points. Additionally, Pearl Labs has introduced an expert-driven reputation system aimed at delivering high-quality and challenging AI training datasets.

data.title: Russia plans to introduce cryptocurrency regulations in July, with the aim of taking effect in 2027.
data.description: Russia plans to introduce cryptocurrency regulations in July this year and submit them to a vote by State Duma deputies. Anatoly Aksakov, Chairman of the State Duma's Financial Market Committee, stated that a comprehensive cryptocurrency legislative framework is expected to be ready by the end of June, and if passed, the relevant regulations will officially take effect on July 1, 2027. The report states that the legislation aims to allow retail and institutional investors to purchase Bitcoin by mid-2027 and establish clear regulatory requirements for cryptocurrency exchanges, with unregistered exchange operators potentially facing fines or imprisonment. According to the plan, retail investors will need to pass a qualification test, and their annual purchase limit may be capped at $4,000. The Central Bank of Russia is expected to develop a whitelist of crypto assets available for retail investors to trade, potentially covering mainstream assets such as Bitcoin and Ethereum, while qualified investors will be able to trade tokens not on the list. (DL News)

data.title: The crypto market generally saw a correction, with only AI, RWA, and CeFi sectors remaining relatively resilient.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the overall crypto market is generally trending downwards. Bitcoin (BTC) fell 0.80%, dropping below $89,000; Ethereum (ETH) fell 0.62%, dropping below $3,000. Only the AI, RWA, and CeFi sectors remained relatively resilient, rising 1.81%, 0.98%, and 0.33%, respectively. Within the AI ​​sector, Worldcoin (WLD) rose 18.91%, and Kite (KITE) rose 16.09%. Within the RWA sector, Pendle (PENDLE) and Sky (SKY) rose 3.51% and 2.62%, respectively. In the CeFi sector, Binance Coin (BNB) rose 0.20%. In other sectors, the Layer 2 sector fell 0.27% in the last 24 hours, but Mantle (MNT) rose 2.41%; the Layer 1 sector fell 0.42%, with Canton Network (CC) bucking the trend and rising 6.39%; the PayFi sector fell 0.45%, with Trust Wallet (TWT) rising 1.82%; the DeFi sector fell 0.62%, but Jito (JTO) surged 20.44%; the Meme sector fell 1.46%, with PIPPIN (PIPPIN), which surged yesterday, experiencing a pullback, falling 19.66%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical sector performance show that the ssiDeFi, ssiRWA, and ssiAI indices rose 1.80%, 1.74%, and 1.63%, respectively.

data.title: Ethereum-Based USDT Activity Surges Amid Bitcoin Price Decline
data.description: Active addresses for Ethereum-based USDT have reached a new 30-day moving average high of 300,000, indicating heightened on-chain activity. According to NS3.AI, this increase in activity aligns with Bitcoin's inability to break the $92,000 resistance level, leading to a drop in its price. The rise in Ethereum-based USDT activity is attributed to the movement of funds into DeFi protocols and self-custody wallets on the Ethereum network, rather than centralized exchanges.
